scenario: Repeated charging notifications appear when one Voyager Free 20 earbud is worn and the other is placed in the open charging case
description_clean: When using Poly Voyager Free 20 earbuds with one earbud worn and the other placed in the open, unplugged charging case, repeated charging notifications appear instead of a single notification for the earbud that is charging.
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure the Poly Voyager Free 20 earbuds are connected to the app.
3. Wear one earbud (e.g., left) and leave the other earbud (e.g., right) out of your ear.
4. Place the unused earbud (right) into the open, unplugged charging case.
5. Observe the notification area on your Android device for charging status notifications from the Poly Studio Mobile app.
expected: A single notification should appear indicating that the earbud placed in the charging case is charging.
actual: Repeated charging notifications appear continuously instead of a single notification for the earbud that is charging.
